Widget.name: btnFcBank
Widget.toolTip: Display the presets in virtual banks according to the FC Controllers Bank Size.

Widget.name: emptyListText
Widget.text: Drop files here to add them to the Browser.

Widget.name: labelDescription
Widget.text: Select a device from the list below and choose Connect:

Widget.name: btnPing
Widget.toolTip: Pings the selected device. Please watch the device for its MIDI IN signal.

Widget.name: labelDescription1
Widget.text: Cabs IRs can be easily auditioned using SCRATCHPADS - special memory locations designed specifically for temporary use.

Widget.name: labelDescription2
Widget.text: Easy Setup modifies your current Axe-Fx preset for easy auditioning by setting its cab blocks(s) to use SCRATCHPAD locations. These changes are temporary and are not stored.

Widget.name: labelReview
Widget.text: Review/edit Easy Setup Suggestions below and click OK to continue.

Widget.name: checkDontShow
Widget.text: Do not show again automatically this session

Widget.name: labelDescription1
Widget.text: You are saving a Preset-Cab Bundle bundle containing the Cab(s) shown below.

Widget.name: labelDescription2
Widget.text: Select a location for each item below and click SAVE.

Widget.name: labelDescription3
Widget.text: The preset will be updated to automatically refer to the new location of the Cab(s).

Widget.name: labelReview
Widget.text: Review/edit suggestions below and click OK to continue.

Widget.name: labelDescription
Widget.text: Layout Links cause a footswitch to also change the layout on one or more FC Controllers. This does not interfere with the tap or hold functions of the switch.

Widget.name: labelDescription
Widget.text: Please enter a unique name for the library entry.

Widget.name: checkCurrentChannel
Widget.text: Save only current channel (Does NOT include Modifiers)
Widget.toolTip: Saves only the current channel of the selected block.

Widget.name: checkEntireBlock
Widget.toolTip: Saves all of the channels of the block.

Widget.name: btnTap
Widget.toolTip: To set the tempo, tap two or more times.

Widget.name: btnControllers
Widget.toolTip: Contollers are used as Modifier SOURCES to automate parameter changes in realtime.

Widget.name: btnFcMasking
Widget.toolTip: Configures the Preset and Scene name controls to mask the characters that fit on the FC scribble strips.

Widget.name: editTempo
Widget.toolTip: Click to set a new tempo.

Widget.name: jackInput
Widget.tooltipNormal: Click to show connect/disconnect options for this jack.
Widget.tooltipSelected: Click another highlighted jack to connect/disconnect.

Widget.name: jackOutput
Widget.tooltipNormal: Click to show connect/disconnect options for this jack.
Widget.tooltipSelected: Click another highlighted jack to connect/disconnect.

Widget.name: columnSelector
Widget.toolTip: Drag this handle to move entire column

Widget.name: rowSelector
Widget.toolTip: Drag this handle to move entire row

Widget.name: labelInstructions
Widget.text: Select a block on the grid to view and edit its parameters. To select a scene, click a Scene number below or use the Scene Select buttons, Scenes menu, or +/- controls above. To rename a preset or scene, double-click its name below or single-click the preset or scene name controls above.

Widget.name: labelPerformWarning
Widget.text: Please note: while Perform is shown the controls are disabled to allow dragging. Hold SHIFT to disable dragging and allow the control to be changed.

Widget.name: labelDescription
Widget.text: Drag and drop blocks from below to the grid above to design presets.

Widget.name: btnTracking
Widget.toolTip: When Tracking is turned on, the first column block changes automatically to show the selected grid block.

Widget.name: btnReset
Widget.toolTip: Reset the block columns to their default selection (Amp 1, Cab 1, Drive 1, Delay 1).

Widget.name: labelTitle1
Widget.text: Drag and drop any control from the bottom panel to the Performance Control slots below. Controls in the bottom panel are disabled unless you hold SHIFT.

Widget.name: labelTitle2
Widget.text: Double-click to edit any Performance Control Label. To change blocks while in this view, use the blue triangle towards the top left of the bottom panel ( ).

Widget.name: btnCopy
Widget.toolTip: Copy the selected control to the clipboard.

Widget.name: btnPaste
Widget.toolTip: Paste from the clipboard to the selected control.

Widget.name: btnCopyToGlobal
Widget.toolTip: Copy the Per-Preset Controls to the Global Controls.

Widget.name: btnCopyToPP
Widget.toolTip: Copy the Global Controls to the Per-Preset Controls.

Widget-Layout.name: labelEzModeHelp
Widget-Layout.text: EZ Mode Enabled! Use FC footswitches to make selections.

Widget-Functions.name: labelLayoutLinksHelp
Widget-Functions.text: With Layout Links, the Tap or Hold function of any switch can serve double-duty to also change the layout on one or more FC Controllers in your rig.

Widget-Functions.name: labelPPOverlay
Widget-Functions.text: This global switch is currently controlled by a per-preset override (shown at right).

Widget-Overrides.name: labelLayoutPpEdit
Widget-Overrides.toolTip: Click here to jump to the Per-Preset defintion.

Widget-Functions.name: labelLayoutLinksHelp
Widget-Functions.text: With Layout Links, the Tap or Hold function of any switch can serve double-duty to also change the layout on one or more FC Controllers in your rig.

Widget-Functions.name: labelHelp
Widget-Functions.text:
Per-Preset Switch Definitions can be used to completely override any switch when any preset is loaded.
When an override is enabled, this panel edits the 24 Per-Preset Switch Definitions for the current preset only.

Widget.name: btnMultiSelection
Widget.toolTip: Enables making (M)ultiple selections for assigning colors. Colors help identify your favorites in the long list. While (M) is enabled, please double-click if you actually want to change the selected amp or cab. Toggling (M) also toggles the PUSHPIN.

Widget.name: btnSortAlpha
Widget.toolTip: Sort the list items in alphabetical order.

Widget.name: labelDescription
Widget.text: Select a category below to display preferences

Widget.name: labelPortsNotes
Widget.text: The FM9 connects automatically. You should not need to manually select ports. Selecting ports allows the editor to communicate with your FM9. Port names refer to MIDI even when connected via USB.

Widget.name: labelKnobNotes
Widget.text: Hold ALT to momentarily toggle the knob mode.

Widget.name: labelKnobRingNotes
Widget.text: Sets the brightness of the meter and knob LED ring.

Widget.name: labelParameterRefreshNotes
Widget.text: Controls the refresh rate of the block parameters, meters, and graphs.

Widget.name: notesIrProcessing
Widget.string: Fractal Audio factory IRs are processed with proprietary minimum phase transformation (MPT) which guards against phase problems when you mix cabs. This setting allows you to disable or enable MPT when importing IRs, or use "Auto Trim" to remove superfluous silence from the start of the IR without applying MPT.

Widget.name: notesIrOutput
Widget.string: This determines the format of the resulting User Cab IR when you import .IR or .wav files.

Widget.name: notesWavImport
Widget.string: Determines which channels are imported when stereo .wav files are added to the Manage Browser pane.

Widget.name: blockLibBrowse
Widget.toolTip: Choose the directory where Library entries will be stored

Widget.name: blockLibNotes
Widget.string: Choosing a new directory will remove all available entries from the Library and repopulate the Library with entries from the chosen directory.

Widget.name: templatesBrowse
Widget.toolTip: Choose the directory where Preset Templates will be accessed

Widget.name: templatesNotes
Widget.string: The Preset Templates directory allows for importing common preset configurations from a fixed directory. To create new templates, simply export the currently viewed preset to this directory using "Save as Template..." from the Preset menu.

Widget.name: settingsShow
Widget.toolTip: Shows the directory where the editor stores the settings files.

Widget.name: settingsNotes
Widget.string: The editor stores its settings files in the Global Settings directory. This directory is Operating-System specific and can not be changed by the end-user.

Widget.name: labelDescription
Widget.text: A Preset+Cab Bundle contains one preset plus any User Cab Impulse Responses (IRs) used by that preset. Bundles make it easier to share sounds and are easy to export and import. IRs that this preset refers to but does not use are excluded but can be included manually by checking them. Examples include cabs that are muted or channels that are not referred to by any scene. Factory cabs cannot be exported/checked.

Widget.name: labelDescription
Widget.text: This utility unpacks a Preset-Cab Bundle and saves it ready-for-use to your FM9. A Preset+Cab Bundle contains one preset plus all of the User Cab impulse Response (IRs) it requires. To proceed, you must select a location to save each of the items listed below. The preset will be updated automatically to refer to the location(s) you selected for the Cab(s).

Widget.name: btnAutoPick
Widget.toolTip: Chooses the first available EMPTY slot for each item.

Widget.name: btnUnlock
Widget.toolTip: Use the currently selected SAVE TO locations.

Widget.name: labelImportHelp
Widget.text: Import button remains disabled until you set a SAVE TO location for at least one item above.

Widget-Sections.name: editSongNum
Widget-Sections.toolTip: Enter a song number to edit its Song Sections
